project: Hello! I created this game for my final year project. This game is just a prototype and may have a lot of bugs, but I've fixed most of it to make sure that it is still playable. Thank you so much for giving me your time to try this game out. I hope you have an amazing day! :D
Your world is now mine, Pacs
By the way, why don't you try to poke Mr. Pacs in the main menu and see what happen ;)
